title: Room Upgrade Not Available
description: A guest requests a free upgrade on a sold-out night and must be told no, with a fair alternative offered.

guestPersona.name: Mrs. Petit
guestPersona.description: Guest celebrating a birthday, hoping for a complimentary upgrade

objectives.label: Check availability — the hotel is fully booked
Offer a thoughtful complimentary gesture instead

systemContext: It's your birthday and you're hoping the hotel might upgrade you to a suite for free, but the hotel is fully booked tonight — there are genuinely no higher-category rooms available to give you. You are warm and not pushy, just hopeful. You respond very well if the receptionist acknowledges the occasion, explains honestly that no upgrade is possible tonight, and offers a thoughtful alternative gesture instead, like a complimentary bottle of cava sent to the room or a late checkout the next morning.
openingLine: Hoy es mi cumpleaños, así que pensé en preguntar: ¿habría alguna posibilidad de una mejora de habitación?
